flags_raised: Semantic divergence detected: Agent output only 23.2% aligned with expected compliance behavior
Behavioral drift detected: 32.7% deviation from historical baseline

root_cause_analysis.root_cause: The agent failed because it lacked explicit instruction to cross-verify the vendor against the approved vendor registry and to check for duplicate invoices within a 30-day window.

remediation.corrected_system_prompt: Process this transaction, ensuring compliance with all applicable policy rules, including cross-verification of the vendor against the current approved vendor registry and checking for duplicate invoices within a 30-day window.
remediation.constraint_added: Cross-verify the vendor against the current approved vendor registry and check for duplicate invoices within a 30-day window before approving any transaction.
preventive_measures: Implement regular audits of agent decision-making processes to identify potential gaps in compliance
Develop and integrate a comprehensive testing framework to ensure agent adherence to policy rules
Establish clear guidelines and training for agent developers on incorporating policy constraints into system prompts

governance.next_step: Route to AI Governance Team for prompt review and approval before redeployment
governance.audit_trail: Full reasoning trace preserved in incident log
